payload.description: The MTA is the public benefit corporation of the State of New York responsible for an integrated mass transportation system for the City of New York and Dutchess, Nassau, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Suffolk and Westchester counties.

The MTA Corporate Governance Committee met on May 28, 2025 at 2 Broadway – 20th Floor, New York, New York. The meeting was called to order at 8:38 AM and adjourned at 9:19 AM. Items included: approval of minutes, review of procurement guidelines, review of Code of Ethics, review of Whistleblower Policy, and review of Public Authorities Law policies.

Scheduled meeting of the MTA Corporate Governance Committee at 2 Broadway 20th Floor, 9:00-9:30 AM ET. Agenda items: Public Comments, Approval of May 28 2025 Minutes, Approval of Proposed 2026 Committee Work Plan, Review MTA By-laws, Review Board Committee Charters, Review Governance Guidelines, Review and Approve MTA Policies.

tool_args.label: Proposed Revision to Diversity Committee Charter

payload.description: Proposed revision to the MTA Diversity Committee Charter incorporating a new section requiring the Chief Accessibility Officer to provide the Diversity Committee with reports regarding achievement of diversity as it relates to accessibility in the workplace.

payload.claim_text: The change was made to align the guidelines with Public Authorities Law Section 1265B which was amended to increase the threshold for Tier 2 small business development program contracts from 3 million to 5 million.
payload.statement: The threshold for Tier 2 small business development program contracts was increased from $3 million to $5 million.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: 20th Anniversary of MTA Code of Ethics

payload.claim_text: The MTA is celebrating the 20th anniversary of the Code of Ethics. The MTA adopted its first All Agency Code of Ethics on May 25, 2005.
payload.statement: The MTA adopted its first All Agency Code of Ethics on May 25, 2005, and is celebrating the 20th anniversary.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.claim_text: Upon motion duly made and seconded, the Committee approved the revised All-Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines and All-Agency Service Contract Procurement Guidelines.
payload.statement: The Committee approved the revised All-Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines and All-Agency Service Contract Procurement Guidelines.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: Four Public Authorities Law Policies Approved

payload.claim_text: Upon motion duly made and seconded, the Board approved all four policies required by Public Authorities Law Section 2824.
payload.statement: The Board approved all four policies required by Public Authorities Law Section 2824.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.claim_text: We are recommending a revision to the Diversity Committee Charter incorporating a new section requiring the Chief Accessibility Officer to provide the Diversity Committee with reports regarding achievement of diversity as it relates to accessibility in the workplace.
payload.statement: The proposed revision to the Diversity Committee Charter requires the Chief Accessibility Officer to report on diversity as it relates to workplace accessibility.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.claim_text: These governance guidelines, as amended, have been recommended by the Governance Committee and approved by the Chair and a majority of the members of the MTA Board. Amended December 20, 2023.
payload.statement: The MTA Governance Guidelines were amended and approved on December 20, 2023.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: Alcohol and Drug Free Workplace Policy

payload.claim_text: The proposed All Agency Alcohol and Drug Free Workplace Policy Directive is to ensure awareness and compliance by MTA employees. The drug and alcohol policies of MTA and its constituent Agencies are governed by a variety of laws and regulations.
payload.statement: The proposed All Agency Alcohol and Drug Free Workplace Policy Directive aims to ensure awareness and compliance by MTA employees.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: Lisa Sorin called May 2025 CGC meeting to order

payload.description: Lisa Sorin called the May 28, 2025 meeting of the MTA Corporate Governance Committee to order at 8:38 AM.
The Committee approved the revised All-Agency General Contract Procurement Guidelines and All-Agency Service Contract Procurement Guidelines.
The Board approved all four policies required by Public Authorities Law Section 2824.

payload.claim_text: The Chair has established the following 10 Committees: Audit Committee, Committee on Finance, Committee on Operations of NYCT/MaBSTOA/SIRTOA/MTA Bus Company, Committee on Operation of Metro-North Commuter Railroad, Committee on Operation of LIRR, Committee on Operations of TBTA, Capital Program Committee, Diversity Committee, Corporate Governance Committee, Safety Committee.
